problem id: eb12e80d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00111011 -> 01110001
  00001110 -> 00011101
  11000011 -> 10011110
  01110110 -> 11100010
  00100010 -> 01000000
  01000100 -> 10000000
  00011001 -> 00110001
  01110000 -> 11101110

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 11000111
